## 🎯 Key Content Highlights

### Quantitative Results
- **Job Search Accuracy**: 95% precision, 91% recall, F1-score 0.93
- **Affordability Scoring**: 87% correlation with actual living expenses
- **User Satisfaction**: 92% satisfaction rate, 25% improvement over baseline
- **System Reliability**: 91% valid output on first try, 97% with retries
- **Performance**: Sub-2-second latency for job searches

### Technical Depth
- **4-layer architecture** (Frontend, Backend, AI/ML Services, Database)
- **4 core modules** with detailed implementation
- **3 code listings** demonstrating real implementation
- **1 formal algorithm** for job search and affordability scoring
- **6 UML diagrams** covering all system aspects

### Academic Rigor
- **Literature survey** covering traditional, data-driven, and AI approaches
- **Comparative analysis** against 5 existing platforms
- **Experimental setup** with benchmark datasets
- **Performance metrics** with baseline comparisons
- **Limitations and future work** sections

## 🔄 Conversion to DOCX

### Quick Start (Pandoc)
```bash
# Install Pandoc
brew install pandoc  # macOS

# Convert individual parts
pandoc SALARIANN_REPORT_PART1_FRONTMATTER_CHAPTERS1-2.md -o Part1.docx
pandoc SALARIANN_REPORT_PART2_CHAPTERS3-4.md -o Part2.docx
pandoc SALARIANN_REPORT_PART3_CHAPTERS5-6.md -o Part3.docx
pandoc SALARIANN_REPORT_PART4_CHAPTERS7-8_APPENDICES.md -o Part4.docx

# Combine into single document
pandoc Part1.md Part2.md Part3.md Part4.md -o SALARIANN_COMPLETE_REPORT.docx
```

### Formatting Specifications
- **Font**: Times New Roman
- **Body text**: 12pt
- **Chapter headings**: 16pt, Bold, Centered
- **Section headings**: 14pt, Bold, Left-aligned
- **Line spacing**: 1.5
- **Alignment**: Justified
- **Margins**: 1 inch (1.5 inch left for binding)
- **Page numbers**: Roman numerals (front matter), Arabic (chapters)
